selection_policy: Perceptual-deduped 200-image bulk OOD/OE takviye built from live-downloaded and repo-local internet candidates. Excludes exact target-runtime hash overlaps and dHash near duplicates within the selected batch. OE bulk_other_crop_negatives are auxiliary negatives, not final OOD evidence.
